completed.description:
When kind=task, restrict to open (incomplete) or completed tasks. Ignored when kind is not 'task'. Defaults to 'any' (no filter).

* `any` - any
* `open` - open
* `completed` - completed

item_id.description: Filter by the ID of the resource being commented on.

kind.description:
Filter by comment kind. 'task' returns only items intentionally created as actionable. 'comment' excludes tasks. Defaults to 'any' (no filter).

* `any` - any
* `comment` - comment
* `task` - task

scope.description: Filter by resource type (e.g. Dashboard, FeatureFlag, Insight, Replay).

source_comment.description: Filter replies to a specific parent comment.
